title: corymbia citriodora
intro: Corymbia citriodora, also known as Lemon-scented Gum, is a species of tree native to Australia, characterized by its distinctive lemon-scented leaves and timber. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective against a range of health issues. The health benefits of Corymbia citriodora include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and soothing skin irritations, among others. In herbal preparations, the leaves and twigs are typically used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve mood, and support overall well-being.
